title: tuziyo.com - AI Image & Video Generation Studio
excerpt: Create images and videos from prompts with multiple AI models, reusable sessions, reference images, and production-ready output controls.
content_html:
Create any visual you can imagine

A cinematic creative workspace for generating images and videos, editing pictures, and preparing polished assets for every project.

10 free credits for every new account. No credit card required.

GPT ImageNano BananaSeedanceGrokRecraft

Creative workflow

Everything you need to shape the shot

Move from idea to finished asset with AI image creation and practical finishing tools in one focused workflow.

Open studio

From idea to final asset

Generate the direction, refine the frame, then export images and video-ready assets without breaking momentum.

Creative brief

Prompt

Start from a short idea, a product direction, or a reference frame.

Image and video

Generate

Create still visuals and short motion concepts from the same workspace.

Image finishing

Edit

Repair, crop, resize, and convert outputs without breaking the creative flow.

Ready to use

Export

Prepare final assets for campaigns, social posts, product pages, and internal drafts.

High-impact visuals for every format

From posters and product scenes to social cuts and cinematic frames, keep the visual direction consistent.

Open studio

Make your next visual with tuziyo

Start with an idea, shape the look, and finish it with the tools your content needs.

Start Free Now
